title: AI-generated test validation
summary: Generated tests can increase speed but may produce false confidence if assertions are weak or intent is missing.
evidence: Radar attention to mutation testing for weak suites.
recommended_action: Experiment with mutation testing on one critical module.

title: Playwright trace adoption in CI
summary: Trace artifacts shorten flaky test investigations when stored and linked from CI runs.
evidence: Official trace viewer documentation and CI integration patterns.
recommended_action: Enable trace-on-first-retry for nightly regression.

title: WCAG 2.2 checklist update pending
summary: Accessibility smoke checklist may need new focus and target-size criteria from WCAG 2.2.
evidence: WCAG 2.2 published criteria differ from 2.1 checklists.
recommended_action: Review internal checklist against WCAG 2.2 new success criteria.

title: k6 load gate for staging releases
summary: Proposal to add k6 smoke load tests with SLO thresholds before major releases.
evidence: k6 docs describe threshold-based pass/fail in CI.
recommended_action: Draft threshold script for top checkout API.

title: Pact contract pilot for billing API
summary: Billing service consumer team proposed a Pact contract to catch schema breaks pre-deploy.
evidence: Pact documentation on consumer-driven contracts.
recommended_action: Schedule 2-week pilot with one consumer-provider pair.

title: No-code automation vendor demo claims
summary: Vendor demo suggested full regression coverage without engineering effort; needs skeptical review.
evidence: Community skepticism on no-code maintenance cost.
recommended_action: Decline purchase until pilot evidence on maintainability.

title: Production trace sampling for QA feedback
summary: SRE team enabled trace sampling; QA should define which spans validate critical journeys.
evidence: OpenTelemetry spec and adoption in observability stacks.
recommended_action: Document span requirements for five critical user flows.

title: Legacy Selenium Grid maintenance burden
summary: Old Selenium Grid cluster costs more to maintain than migrating critical flows to Playwright.
evidence: Team retrospective on grid flake rate and maintenance hours.
recommended_action: Archive grid after Playwright migration milestone.

title: Ministry of Testing conference season
summary: MoT events offer workshops on AI testing and leadership; worth team attendance planning.
evidence: Official MoT events page lists upcoming conferences.
recommended_action: Nominate two team members for MoT workshops.

title: axe-core CI integration for design system
summary: Design system team ready to add axe checks in Storybook CI pipeline.
evidence: axe-core integrates with common test runners.
recommended_action: Add axe to Storybook test job this sprint.

title: DORA metrics alignment workshop
summary: Engineering leadership asked QA to align flake rate reporting with DORA change failure rate.
evidence: DORA research links stability metrics to delivery performance.
recommended_action: Propose joint dashboard with devops for one product line.

title: OWASP ZAP DAST scan in staging
summary: Security team proposed weekly ZAP baseline scans; QA to triage findings vs test gaps.
evidence: OWASP ZAP docs on baseline scanning.
recommended_action: Join security triage for first ZAP staging report.

title: EU AI Act conformity testing backlog
summary: Legal flagged potential high-risk classification; QA must define conformity tests, logging checks and human oversight scenarios.
evidence: Regulation Articles 9–15 require risk management, data governance, logging and oversight.
recommended_action: Schedule gap workshop with legal; draft conformity test checklist.

title: LLM codegen validation gate proposal
summary: Engineering proposes mandatory mutation testing and security scan on AI-generated test and production code before merge.
evidence: OWASP LLM risks LLM02/05 and NIST SSDF PO.4 require output validation and review.
recommended_action: Pilot gate on one repo: SAST + mutation score on AI-tagged PRs.

title: NIST AI RMF adoption in QA program
summary: Enterprise architecture asked QA to map existing regression and eval harnesses to NIST AI RMF Measure and Manage functions.
evidence: NIST AI RMF 1.0 Core functions and Playbook cite continuous evaluation and monitoring.
recommended_action: Produce RMF-to-test mapping spreadsheet for leadership review.

title: ISO 42001 audit prep for QA evidence
summary: Certification project needs QA to link CI artifacts, AI test policy and role assignments to ISO 42001 controls.
evidence: ISO 42001 requires documented operation controls and evidence of effectiveness.
recommended_action: Inventory test artifacts against Annex A control themes.

title: Agent Skills for QA automation
summary: Agent Skills modularize QA workflows (test generation, evidence packaging, PRD rendering) into reusable, on-demand packages with growing plugin marketplaces.
evidence: TW Radar Vol 34 promotes Agent Skills to Trial; ecosystem includes plugin marketplaces and skill registries.
recommended_action: Package one internal QA workflow as an agent skill and evaluate reuse.

title: Browser-based component testing adoption accelerating
summary: Playwright CT and real-browser component testing get stronger industry endorsement with TW Radar promoting to Trial. Performance and flakiness concerns have meaningfully decreased.
evidence: TW Radar Vol 34: browser-based component testing promoted to Trial ring.
recommended_action: Pilot Playwright CT on one component suite; compare flakiness and speed vs. jsdom.

title: Structured LLM output for test case generation
summary: LLM providers now offer native structured output modes. Libraries like Instructor and Pydantic AI provide stable abstractions across providers with validation and retry.
evidence: TW Radar Vol 34 promotes Structured Output from LLMs to Adopt; all major providers support it.
recommended_action: Adopt structured output (Instructor or Pydantic AI) as the default for all LLM-based test generation in our pipeline.

title: Feedback sensors for QA coding agents
summary: Wiring deterministic quality gates (linters, compilers, test suites, schema validators) into agentic workflows so failures trigger timely self-correction, reducing human review burden.
evidence: TW Radar Vol 34 promotes Feedback Sensors to Trial; teams report fewer failed builds and reduced review burden.
recommended_action: Wire our existing validation gates (validate:release, tsc --noEmit, eslint) into the QA agentic workflow.
